resources.string: Freeze the current server-side layout by stopping updating of Hot Config and Cold Config.\nThe following four values are automatically set when this setting is turned on.

[Only for debug purpose] Instead of freezing the current layout, disable all server-side layout updates. This setting is equivalent to \"Disable layout updates\" setting in the inotia00\'s official RVX.
Wait 10 seconds and press the \"Restart\" button to reflect server-side layouts.
